svg.title: AWS Lakehouse ETL Pipeline Architecture
svg.desc: Data flows from S3 Raw through AWS Glue into Bronze, Silver, Gold S3 layers and then into Redshift Serverless. Terraform provisions all infrastructure.

g.text: Reads only new files via watermark
ACID upserts · time travel · partition pruning

svg.text: Provisions S3, Glue, Redshift, IAM, networking end to end
